title: Spandam Tightens Control
description: The Sea Train becomes a chain of small battles as Sanji, Franky, CP9 agents, and government forces clash car by car.
scene: Across pages 13, 14, 15, this part follows Sanji, Franky, Nico Robin, Spandam, CP9 agent. The Sea Train becomes a chain of small battles as Sanji, Franky, CP9 agents, and government forces clash car by car.
